items.title: Home
items.text:
In development • Preclinical testing PHLYXR - a contraceptive sexual lubricant that prevents STI transmission A New Era in Sexual Health Microbiome friendly • Non-hormonal • Designed for vaginal pH • Vegan Join the mailing list Take the survey Startbook Why it matters • What we are building • Progress • Investors

In development

PHLYXR is currently in preclinical testing and is not yet approved for STI prevention or contraception. We are designing it to be used alongside safer sex choices whilst we plan our clinical trials.

items.title: STIs remain high and drug resistance is rising
items.text:
STI diagnoses remain high across England, and antibiotic resistance is a growing threat, particularly for gonorrhoea where treatment options are narrowing.

+506% Gonorrhoea cases in Europe since 2010 ECDC 2010-2023 16,050 Gonorrhoea diagnoses in England (Apr-Jun 2025) UKHSA Dec 2025 2,040 Infectious syphilis diagnoses in England (Apr-Jun 2025) UKHSA Dec 2025 24 Ceftriaxone resistant gonorrhoea cases (to 28 Nov 2025) UKHSA Dec 2025 Ceftriaxone resistant gonorrhoea cases are accelerating 13 24 2024 2025* *Provisional to 28 Nov 2025. Total reported in England to this date: 62 cases, including 22 extensively drug resistant (XDR). Source What this means: people want protection that fits real life. Something that is easy, on demand, and does not interrupt intimacy.

items.title: What we are building
items.text:
PHLYXR is a next generation lubricant concept designed to combine a premium feel with an added protective function.

💧 Feels like a premium lubricant

Texture and sensation matter. We are designing PHLYXR to be enjoyable to use, not a compromise.

🦠 Designed around the vaginal microbiome

pH-matched to the typical vaginal pH range and avoiding common irritants, so it is gentler and more comfortable.

🛡️ A new layer of prevention

Our formulation approach aims to bind and neutralise pathogens whilst acting as a spermicidal too. This is being tested in vitro.

items.title: How it works
items.text: 1 Apply like any other lubricant.       No new behaviour, no interruption. Water-based so can be used everywhere and with everything.      2 Creates a protective layer.       Designed to stay in place during sex and provide peace of mind.      3 Targets transmission in the fluid layer.       Lab testing is focused on pathogen binding and viability reduction.

items.title: Survey Information Page
items.text:
Thank you for taking the time to fill in this questionnaire. We're currently working on a gel that will prevent STIs and act as a contraceptive.

Find out more about us on our socials: Instagram • LinkedIn

items.title: About This Survey
items.text:
This survey is to gauge interest in such a product. There'll be an initial question for consent that you'll need to answer before moving forward with the rest of the survey. You'll be asked about your current contraceptive and STI prevention methods, such as the pill, coil and condom usage, and about the potential device, known as PHLYXR.

Important Disclaimer

All responses to this survey are provided anonymously meaning that we will not be able to attribute any of your responses to you personally. We will not process any personal data (as defined under the UK GDPR) about you as a result of your participation in this survey.

For details on how Google may process your personal data, please see its privacy notice here.

items.title: Information Sheet and Participation Consent
items.text:
Please read the following carefully:

Project Details

Project title: PHLYXR Surveyor: Sophie Stephens

You are being invited to take part in a market research survey. Before you decide it is important for you to understand why the survey is being done and what it will involve. Please take time to read the following information carefully and discuss it with others if you wish.

Please ask if there is anything that is not clear or if you would like more information. Our email address is hello@phlyxr.com. Take time to decide whether or not you wish to take part.

Thank you for reading this.

items.title: Do I have to take part?
items.text: It is up to you to decide whether or not to take part. If you do decide to take part you can copy this information page to keep and be asked to give electronic consent in the first question. If you decide to take part you are still free to withdraw at any time and without giving a reason.

items.title: What is the purpose of the survey?
items.text:
The purpose of this market research survey is to determine whether there is demand for a contraceptive gel lubricant that can prevent STI spread (transmission) between sexually active individuals.

The ingredients contained in the gel have been shown in research to bind and block the parts of viruses and bacteria that would give them entry into cells (causing infection), therefore preventing infection.

The STIs it may prevent include: - Chlamydia - Gonorrhoea - HIV - HPV - HSV

The device also has the potential to act as a non-invasive and non-hormonal contraceptive, this is a secondary purpose. It would provide additional security and peace of mind in certain circumstances, such as condom failure.

For such a device to be developed, there must be demand for it and the market size for this device must be determined. This includes market demographics and whether potential users would be willing to try such a device.

items.title: Why have I been invited?
items.text: The link to this market research survey is publicly available and is to be shared on social media channels as well other, appropriate areas of the internet. The aim is to collect as many responses as possible to determine if there's a large enough market for this product.

items.title: What will happen to me if I take part?
items.text:
Survey Details

  • Number of questions: 14
  • Time to complete: 5-10 minutes
  • Frequency: One-time only
  • Email collection: None
  • Follow-up contact: None (unless you sign up to our mailing list separately)

As no personal contact details or identifiable information are being collected all results are completely anonymised. All responses to this survey are provided anonymously meaning that we will not be able to attribute any of your responses to you personally.

We will not process any personal data (as defined under the UK GDPR) about you as a result of your participation in this survey. For details on how Google may process your personal data, please see its privacy notice here.

items.title: What do I have to do?
items.text:
Complete the survey as completely as you can. If any questions make you uncomfortable and you feel unable to answer, please skip them.

There are no restrictions on who can participate. The survey may be difficult to complete if you have not used contraception or had sex before but you may still answer.

items.title: What are the possible disadvantages and risks of taking part?
items.text: As only data is collected there will be no impact or harm to your health or wellbeing. These answers cannot be traced back to you and your data is held securely by Google with the PHLYXR team able to view the answers given. We will not be able to link answers to individuals.

items.title: What are the possible benefits of taking part?
items.text: Unfortunately, there are no benefits to taking part and we can't, at this stage, offer any compensation for your time so thank you for your kindness in taking part.

items.title:
What if something goes wrong?Thank you for taking the time to read this information page! Proceed to Survey Back to Home

Take the Survey
items.text: All data is anonymised and cannot be traced back to you, even in the case of a data breach. All data is processed by Google and any complaints or issues regarding their handling of your data can be directed to them via their privacy policy here.

items.title: 💜 PHLYXR: Protection That Fits Your Life
A sexual lubricant that prevents STI transmission
items.text:
Microbiome Friendly • STI Preventing • Contraceptive • Non-hormonal • Vegan • Sustainable Production • No Prescription Needed

PHLYXR represents a paradigm shift in sexual health—protection that enhances pleasure rather than interrupting it.

items.title: 🦠 Binds Viruses and Bacteria
items.text:
Our patentable formulation uses advanced biomaterials to coat and bind STI pathogens, preventing them from infecting cells.

How it works:

  • Active compounds create a protective barrier
  • Pathogens are neutralised on contact
  • Transmission risk is significantly reduced
  • Non-antibiotic mechanism combats resistance

items.title: 🧬 pH-matched to Vaginal Microbiome
items.text:
Maintains the optimal pH 3.5-4.5 range that supports a healthy lactobacillus-dominant microbiome.

Why it matters:

  • Preserves natural defenses
  • Prevents bacterial vaginosis
  • No disruption to healthy bacteria
  • Supports long-term vaginal health

items.title: 🚫 Contraceptive Properties
items.text:
Spermicidal due to acidity and further prevents sperm motility.

Dual protection:

  • pH-based spermicidal action
  • Mechanical prevention of sperm motility
  • Non-hormonal contraception
  • No systemic side effects

items.title: 🌱 Body-Safe & Sustainable
items.text:
Non-hormonal, vegan formulation with sustainable production methods.

Clean ingredients:

  • No harsh chemicals or irritants
  • Hypoallergenic formulation
  • Environmentally responsible manufacturing
  • Cruelty-free and vegan certified

items.title: 💊 No Prescription Needed
items.text:
Over-the-counter accessibility means protection for everyone.

Easy access:

  • Available at pharmacies and retailers
  • No doctor's appointment required
  • Affordable pricing structure
  • Discreet packaging

items.title: 🔬 Science-Backed
items.text:
Developed by researchers from top UK universities.

Rigorous development:

  • Preclinical testing in progress
  • Clinical trials planned for 2026
  • MHRA approval pathway established
  • Patentable technology

items.title: Pathogen Binding
items.text:
Patentable formulation coats and binds bacteria and viruses

Our proprietary biomaterial technology creates a molecular barrier that:

  • Binds to viral and bacterial surface proteins
  • Prevents pathogen attachment to host cells
  • Neutralises infectivity on contact
  • Works against multiple STI types simultaneously

items.title: Microbiome Support
items.text:
Vaginal-matched pH prevents microbiome disruption

Maintaining pH 3.5-4.5 ensures:

  • Healthy lactobacillus dominance
  • Natural antimicrobial defenses remain intact
  • Prevention of bacterial vaginosis
  • Long-term vaginal health support

items.title: Sperm Immobilisation
items.text:
Spermicidal action prevents pregnancy

Dual contraceptive mechanism:

  • Acidic pH immobilises sperm
  • Additional compounds prevent motility
  • Non-hormonal pregnancy prevention
  • Compatible with other contraceptive methods

items.title: Who Benefits from PHLYXR?
items.text: Anyone who wants protection against STI transmission We designed PHLYXR to be used by anyone needs on-demand STI prevention

items.title: 🆚 PHLYXR vs. Traditional Methods
items.text:
Method STI Protection Contraception Prescription Interrupts Intimacy Microbiome Safe PHLYXR ✅ Broad spectrum ✅ Yes ❌ No ❌ No ✅ Yes Condoms ✅ Yes ✅ Yes ❌ No ⚠️ Yes ✅ Yes PrEP ⚠️ HIV only ❌ No ✅ Yes ❌ No ✅ Yes Hormonal BC ❌ No ✅ Yes ✅ Yes ❌ No ⚠️ Can disrupt Spermicides (N-9) ❌ No ⚠️ Limited ❌ No ⚠️ Yes ❌ Can irritate

PHLYXR is Complementary

PHLYXR is designed to work alongside existing prevention methods, not replace them. We recommend using PHLYXR with condoms for maximum protection.

items.title: For Individuals
items.text: ✅ Seamless protection - No interruption to intimacy ✅ Dual benefits - STI prevention + contraception ✅ Body-safe - pH-balanced, non-irritating ✅ Accessible - No prescription required ✅ Empowering - Take control of your sexual health

items.title: For Public Health
items.text: ✅ Reduces STI transmission - Addresses the global crisis ✅ Combats antibiotic resistance - Non-antibiotic mechanism ✅ Prevents infertility - Reduces STI-related complications ✅ Cost-effective - Prevents expensive treatments ✅ Increases prevention uptake - Easy to use and access

items.title: What Makes Our Technology Unique
items.text:
1. Patentable IP

Our formulation represents novel intellectual property with:

  • Unique biomaterial composition
  • Proprietary binding mechanism
  • Differentiated from existing products
  • Strong patent protection potential

2. Multi-Pathogen Efficacy

Unlike single-target solutions, PHLYXR addresses:

  • Bacterial STIs (Chlamydia, Gonorrhoea)
  • Viral STIs (HSV, HPV, HIV)

3. Microbiome-Friendly

First STI prevention product that:

  • Maintains a natural, acidic vaginal pH
  • Supports a healthy vaginal microbiome
  • Prevents bacterial vaginosis
  • Safe for regular, long-term use

items.title: Privacy Policy & Survey Information
items.text: Last Updated: February 25, 2026

items.title: About This Survey
items.text: Thank you for taking the time to complete the PHLYXR survey. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us develop a product that truly meets the needs of our community.

items.title: What We're Asking
items.text:
This survey takes approximately 5 minutes to complete and covers:

  • Your current sexual health practices
  • Features that matter most to you
  • Pricing preferences
  • Product packaging preferences
  • Demographic information (optional)

items.title: How We Use Your Responses
items.text:
Your survey responses help us:

  • Refine the product formulation based on user preferences
  • Determine optimal pricing that balances accessibility and sustainability
  • Design packaging that meets user needs
  • Understand our target market better
  • Shape our clinical trial design around real-world use cases

items.title: Information We Collect
items.text:
When you complete our survey or join our mailing list, we collect:

Survey Responses: - Answers to survey questions - Optional demographic information (age range, location) - Optional contact information (if you choose to provide it)

Mailing List: - Email address (required) - First name (optional) - Preferences for updates (optional)

Automatically Collected: - Form submission timestamp - Device type (mobile/desktop) - General location (country level only)

items.title: How We Use Your Information
items.text:
We use collected information to:

✅ Product Development - Shape PHLYXR based on user needs ✅ Communication - Send updates about development and launch ✅ Research - Analyze trends and preferences ✅ Clinical Trial Recruitment - Invite interested participants (opt-in only) ✅ Marketing - Understand our audience better

items.title: What We DON'T Do
items.text: ❌ We do NOT sell your data to third parties ❌ We do NOT share identifiable information without consent ❌ We do NOT spam - you can unsubscribe anytime ❌ We do NOT use your data for unrelated purposes

items.title: Data Storage & Security
items.text:
• Storage: Your data is stored securely using Google Forms/Google Workspace with encryption
  • Access: Only core PHLYXR team members have access to survey data
  • Retention: We retain survey data for product development purposes. Mailing list data is kept until you unsubscribe
  • Anonymization: Survey responses are analyzed in aggregate and anonymized for research purposes

items.text:
You have the right to:

  • Access your personal data
  • Correct inaccurate information
  • Delete your data (right to be forgotten)
  • Object to data processing
  • Withdraw consent at any time

To exercise these rights: Email privacy@phlyxr.com

items.title: 🔬 Evidence-Based Innovation
items.text: PHLYXR is built on rigorous scientific research and cutting-edge biomaterial technology.

items.title: 1. Pathogen Binding Technology
items.text:
Proprietary biomaterial formulation

Our patentable technology uses specialised compounds that:

  • Coat viral and bacterial surfaces - Creating a molecular barrier
  • Bind to pathogen proteins - Preventing host cell attachment
  • Neutralise infectivity - Reducing transmission risk
  • Work across pathogen types - Bacteria, viruses, and parasites

Mechanism of Action:

The active compounds in PHLYXR interact with surface proteins on STI pathogens, effectively "wrapping" them and preventing their ability to infect human cells. This physical barrier approach is fundamentally different from antibiotics, making it resistant to antimicrobial resistance.

items.title: 2. pH Optimisation
items.text:
Vaginal-matched pH 3.5-4.5

Maintaining optimal vaginal acidity:

  • Supports lactobacillus dominance - The cornerstone of vaginal health
  • Enhances natural defenses - Acidic environment inhibits pathogens
  • Prevents dysbiosis - No disruption to healthy microbiome
  • Reduces BV risk - Bacterial vaginosis prevention

Why pH Matters:

The healthy vaginal microbiome is dominated by lactobacillus species that produce lactic acid, maintaining pH 3.5-4.5. This acidic environment naturally inhibits many pathogens. Many lubricants disrupt this balance, PHLYXR preserves it.

items.title: 3. Spermicidal Action
items.text:
Dual-mechanism contraception

Non-hormonal pregnancy prevention through:

  • Acidic pH immobilisation - Sperm cannot survive in pH 3.5-4.5
  • Motility inhibition - Additional compounds prevent sperm movement
  • Membrane disruption - Affects sperm cell integrity
  • Immediate action - Protection from first application

Non-Hormonal Advantage:

Unlike hormonal contraceptives, PHLYXR provides contraception without systemic effects, making it suitable for those who cannot or prefer not to use hormonal methods.

items.title: Research Focus Areas
items.text:
STI Pathogen Type Research Status Mechanism Chlamydia Bacterial Preclinical testing Pathogen binding + pH Gonorrhoea Bacterial Preclinical testing Pathogen binding + pH Trichomoniasis Parasitic Preclinical testing Pathogen binding + pH HSV (Herpes) Viral Preclinical testing Viral envelope disruption HPV Viral Preclinical testing Viral capsid binding HIV Viral Research phase Envelope protein binding

Broad-Spectrum Approach

PHLYXR's multi-mechanism approach targets the most common STIs simultaneously, providing comprehensive protection that single-target methods cannot achieve.

items.title: A Non-Antibiotic Solution
items.text:
One of PHLYXR's most important advantages is its non-antibiotic mechanism of action.

Why This Matters:

  • Gonorrhoea is increasingly resistant to antibiotics
  • By 2050, antibiotic resistance could cause 10M deaths/year
  • NHS costs could reach £3B annually for resistant infections

PHLYXR's Advantage:

  • Physical barrier mechanism cannot develop resistance
  • Works against antibiotic-resistant strains
  • Reduces need for antibiotic treatment
  • Prevents infections before they require treatment

Future-Proof Protection

Because PHLYXR uses physical binding rather than chemical killing, pathogens cannot evolve resistance. This makes it a sustainable long-term solution to the STI crisis.

items.title: Common Questions from Researchers and Healthcare Providers
items.text:
Q: How does PHLYXR differ from Nonoxynol-9 spermicides?

A: Unlike N-9, which damages cell membranes indiscriminately (causing irritation and potentially increasing HIV transmission), PHLYXR uses targeted pathogen binding and maintains vaginal pH. Our formulation is designed to be non-irritating and microbiome-safe.

Q: Can pathogens develop resistance to PHLYXR?

A: The physical binding mechanism makes resistance development extremely unlikely. Unlike antibiotics that target specific metabolic pathways, PHLYXR physically coats pathogens, preventing attachment - a mechanism that cannot be easily circumvented through mutation.

Q: What is the mechanism for viral STI prevention?

A: PHLYXR binds to viral envelope proteins (for enveloped viruses like HSV and HIV) or capsid proteins (for non-enveloped viruses like HPV), preventing viral attachment to host cells and disrupting viral integrity.

Q: Is PHLYXR compatible with condoms?

A: Yes, PHLYXR is fully compatible with latex, polyisoprene, and polyurethane condoms. We recommend using both for maximum protection.

Q: What regulatory pathway are you following?

A: PHLYXR will be submitted to the MHRA (Medicines and Healthcare products Regulatory Agency) as a medical device with contraceptive and antimicrobial claims. We are following the appropriate regulatory framework for combination products.

items.title: Public Health Benefits
items.text:
If PHLYXR achieves 10% market penetration in the UK:

Potential Annual Impact:

  • STI cases prevented: 50,000+ (estimated based on current incidence)
  • NHS cost savings: £18M+ (based on £180M current annual costs)
  • Infertility cases prevented: 5,000+ (based on STI-related infertility rates)
  • Antibiotic prescriptions reduced: 100,000+ (reducing resistance pressure)

Global Scale Potential:

With international expansion, PHLYXR could prevent millions of STI cases annually and save billions in healthcare costs worldwide.

items.title: 🌟 Our Mission
items.text: "We believe sexual health protection shouldn't interrupt intimacy. PHLYXR is designed to empower individuals with seamless, science-backed protection that enhances rather than diminishes pleasure."

items.title: Our Values
items.text:
🔬 Scientific Rigor

Every claim is backed by research. We want to create a product that you can trust fully.

🌍 Accessibility

Sexual health protection should be available to everyone, regardless of socioeconomic status or geography.

💜 Inclusivity

We design for diverse bodies, identities, and practices. PHLYXR is for everyone who needs STI protection.

🌱 Sustainability

Environmentally responsible manufacturing and packaging are non-negotiable.

items.title: 🌍 A Global Public Health Emergency
items.text: Sexually transmitted infections (STIs) are surging worldwide, and the consequences are devastating.

items.title: Gonorrhoea
items.text: Over 500% increase since 2010

items.title: Syphilis
items.text: Not quite historical anymore

items.title: Chlamydia
items.text: Still climbing steadily

items.title: UK-Specific Trends
items.text:
• Gonorrhoea cases: ↑218% and climbing
  • Syphilis: ↑216% - a disease we thought was relegated to history
  • HPV vaccinations: ↓68% - leaving people vulnerable
  • HIV diagnoses: Surpassing pre-pandemic levels (6,402 cases in 2023)

items.title: NHS Costs: Today vs. 2050
items.text:
Category Today 2050 (Projected) Increase STI Treatment Costs £180M £3B 17x Deaths from Antibiotic Resistance 1.3M/year 10M/year 7.7x IVF Due to STI Infertility £7-13M/year £11-25M/year ~2x

Antibiotic Resistance Crisis

The rise of antibiotic-resistant STIs (particularly gonorrhoea) threatens to make common infections untreatable. By 2050, antibiotic resistance could cost the NHS £3 billion annually - a 17x increase from today.

This isn't just a health crisis - it's an economic catastrophe in the making.

items.title: Age Demographics
items.text:
People aged 25-34 are most likely to attend sexual health services, but the crisis affects all age groups:

  • 15-24 year olds: Account for >50% of Chlamydia and Gonorrhoea cases in England (2020)
  • 25-34 year olds: Highest clinic attendance and STI diagnosis rates
  • All sexually active individuals: At increased risk due to exponentially rising case numbers

items.title: The Most Common STIs (% of Diagnoses)
items.text: STI % of Diagnoses Chlamydia 63% Gonorrhoea 51% Genital Warts 41% Genital Herpes 36%

items.title: Barriers to Existing Prevention
items.text:
Condoms

  • ✅ Effective when used correctly and consistently
  • ❌ Reduced sensation complaints
  • ❌ Inconsistent use in long-term relationships
  • ❌ Breakage/slippage risks
  • ❌ Requires interruption of intimacy

PrEP (Pre-Exposure Prophylaxis)

  • ✅ Highly effective at preventing HIV
  • ❌ Doesn't protect against other STIs
  • ❌ Requires prescription and daily adherence
  • ❌ Not accessible to everyone
  • ❌ Limited awareness and uptake

Regular Testing

  • ✅ Identifies infections early
  • ❌ Doesn't prevent transmission
  • ❌ Requires clinic access and time
  • ❌ Many STIs are asymptomatic
  • ❌ Testing gaps leave windows of transmission

Vaccinations

  • ✅ Effective for HPV and Hepatitis B
  • ❌ Limited to specific pathogens
  • ❌ Declining uptake rates (68% drop in HPV vaccinations)
  • ❌ Doesn't cover most common STIs

items.title: 💡 The Need for Innovation
items.text:
We need a solution that:

  1. ✅ Integrates seamlessly into intimate moments without interruption
  2. ✅ Provides broad-spectrum protection against multiple STI pathogens
  3. ✅ Requires no prescription or medical intervention
  4. ✅ Works alongside existing prevention methods (condoms, PrEP, testing)
  5. ✅ Is accessible to all sexually active individuals regardless of relationship status
  6. ✅ Addresses antibiotic resistance with non-antibiotic mechanisms

That's why we created PHLYXR.

Discover Our Solution

items.title: 📚 Sources & Research
items.text:
Our data comes from peer-reviewed sources and official health organizations:

  • European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC) - STI surveillance data
  • UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) - National STI statistics
  • NHS England - Sexual health service data
  • World Health Organization (WHO) - Global STI reports
  • The Review on Antimicrobial Resistance - O'Neill Report on antibiotic resistance projections
### The crisis is real. But the solution is here. [Learn About PHLYXR](our-solution.md){.cta-button }

items.title: 🗓️ Our Journey to Market
items.text: PHLYXR is on track for launch in Q4 2027. Here's our detailed development roadmap.

items.title: 📍 Current Status
items.text:
We Are Here: Q4 2025 - Q1 2026

Preclinical in vitro testing & formula refinement

We're currently conducting laboratory efficacy testing against STI pathogens and optimizing our formulation based on results.

items.title: Q1 2025: MVP Creation ✅
items.text:
Status: Complete

  • ✅ Initial formulation development
  • ✅ Proof-of-concept testing
  • ✅ Team assembly
  • ✅ University partnerships established

Outcome: Successfully created minimum viable product demonstrating core functionality.

items.title: Q2/Q3 2025: Characterisation ✅
items.text:
Status: Complete

  • ✅ Rheological testing (texture, viscosity, flow properties)
  • ✅ pH stability testing
  • ✅ Ingredient compatibility studies
  • ✅ Patent landscape searches

Outcome: Confirmed optimal formulation properties and identified patent opportunities.

items.title: Q4 2025 - Q1 2026: Preclinical Testing 🔄
items.text:
Status: In Progress

  • 🔄 In vitro efficacy testing against STI pathogens
  • 🔄 Formula refinement based on test results
  • 🔄 Microbiome impact studies
  • 🔄 Stability and shelf-life testing

Investment: £8k for in vitro efficacy testing

Expected Outcome: Validated efficacy against target pathogens and optimized final formulation.

items.title: Q2 2026: Patent & Production 📅
items.text:
Status: Planned

  • 📋 Patent filing (UK and PCT)
  • 📋 Production and manufacturing setup
  • 📋 Supplier agreements
  • 📋 Quality control protocols

Expected Outcome: IP protection secured and manufacturing capability established.

items.title: Q3 2026-Q3 2027: Clinical Trials 📅
items.text:
Status: Planned

  • 📋 CRO-generated safety data
  • 📋 Early feasibility clinical trial
  • 📋 MHRA approval application
  • 📋 Post-trial formula adjustments (if needed)

Investment:

  • £65k for CRO safety data
  • £1.18M for early feasibility clinical trial
  • £480k for MHRA approval
  • Additional funds required for pivotal clinical trials

Expected Outcome: Clinical validation of safety and efficacy, regulatory approval secured.

items.title: Q4 2027: Product Launch 🎯
items.text:
Status: Target Launch

  • 🎯 Commercial production begins
  • 🎯 Distribution partnerships activated
  • 🎯 Marketing campaign launch
  • 🎯 Direct-to-consumer sales begin
  • 🎯 Pharmacy and retail placement

Expected Outcome: PHLYXR available to consumers across the UK.

items.title: Current Funding Round: £1.8M
items.text:
How funds will be allocated:

Milestone Investment Purpose Timeline In vitro efficacy testing £8k Laboratory pathogen testing Q4 2025 - Q1 2026 CRO safety data £65k Contract research organization safety studies Q3 2026 Clinical trial 1 £1.18M Early feasibility trial with human participants Q3 2026-Q3 2027 MHRA approval £480k Regulatory submission and approval process Q3 2027 Operational costs £67k Marketing, patent maintenance, overhead Ongoing

Total: £1.8M

items.title: Phase 1: Discovery & Formulation ✅ Complete
items.text:
Duration: 9 months (Q1-Q3 2025)

Activities:

  • Literature review and competitive analysis
  • Ingredient selection and sourcing
  • Initial formulation development
  • Proof-of-concept testing
  • Rheological characterization

Key Learnings:

  • Identified optimal pH range for microbiome safety
  • Validated pathogen binding mechanism in principle
  • Confirmed user-acceptable texture and viscosity

items.title: Phase 2: Preclinical Validation 🔄 In Progress
items.text:
Duration: 6 months (Q4 2025 - Q2 2026)

Activities:

  • In vitro testing against Chlamydia, Gonorrhoea, HSV, HPV
  • Microbiome impact studies (lactobacillus cultures)
  • Spermicidal efficacy validation
  • Formula optimization based on results
  • Stability and shelf-life testing

Success Criteria:

  • ≥80% reduction in pathogen viability
  • No disruption to lactobacillus cultures
  • 100% sperm immobilization
  • 24-month shelf stability

items.title: Phase 3: Clinical Trials 📅 Planned Q3 2026-Q3 2027
items.text: Duration: 6-9 months

items.title: Phase 4: Regulatory Approval 📅 Planned Q4 2026
items.text:
Duration: 3-6 months

MHRA Submission:

  • Clinical trial data package
  • Manufacturing and quality control documentation
  • Labeling and instructions for use
  • Safety and efficacy claims substantiation

Regulatory Pathway:

PHLYXR will be submitted as a medical device under UK regulations.

items.title: Phase 5: Market Launch 🎯 Q4 2027
items.text: Duration: Ongoing
